# Edwin Bayona — Full-Stack Web Developer

Edwin Bayona is a freelance full-stack web developer specializing in Next.js, React,
TypeScript, generative AI integrations (Google Gemini), 3D web visualizations
(React Three Fiber), e-commerce development, technical SEO, and WhatsApp automation.

## Services
- E-commerce platforms with visual editors and AI-generated content
- Generative AI integrations (Gemini API, image generation, conversational flows)
- 3D product visualization for web (React Three Fiber / Three.js)
- Multi-country payment gateway integration (Wompi, PayPhone)
- WhatsApp automation and conversion flows
- Technical SEO optimization
- Corporate landing pages with high conversion rates

## Featured Projects
- PawArtStudio: AI-powered pet art e-commerce with 3D product preview, Gemini AI image
  generation, and multi-country payments (Wompi + PayPhone)
- PromoGimmicks: Digital catalog of 1,000+ customizable promotional products
- KS Promocionales: Promotional products store with interactive visual logo editor (React-Konva)
- El Fogon Gourmet: High-conversion restaurant landing page with WhatsApp CTA
- Parasoles y Domos San Andres: Corporate platform with SEO optimization

## Tech Stack
Next.js 14/15/16, React 18/19, TypeScript 5.x, Tailwind CSS 3/4, Node.js,
Google Gemini AI, React Three Fiber, React-Konva, Framer Motion, PostgreSQL,
Wompi, PayPhone, Telegram Bot API, Vite 7
